name: Polka Dot Quick Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan and set aside.
3. Halve the cranberries and place them in a small bowl.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the milk, egg, melted butter, and orange peel.
5. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt into a large bowl.
6. Add the halved cranberries, shredded cheese, and chopped walnuts to the dry ingredients. Toss with a fork until evenly distributed.
7. Pour in the milk mixture and stir until just moistened.
8. Transfer the batter to the prepared loaf pan and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cooling in the pan on a rack for 10 minutes before removing the bread from the pan.
10. Cool the bread to room temperature on a wire rack before slicing.
